title: Sthanarthi Sreekuttan
overview: Four backbenchers. One school election. And a rivalry that shakes up the entire classroom. Sreekuttan vs. Ambadi isn’t just about votes — it’s about pride, friendship and finding your voice when the stakes are as small (and as big) as a school desk.
